---
title: "Rāg Sindhu"
subtitle: "*Muralī dhuni suni*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Jānakī dās &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Jhāpatāl (Madhyalay)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> muralī dhuni suni alī mai yamunā tīra<br>tabaso hama tana mana jobana so bikāi

**Antarā**

> pavana gati hīna bhai yamunā ujāna bahe<br>bisara gai gavana śuka sāri hamārī pyārī

**Sañcārī**

> thagita bhai mīna gau tṛṇa na cabāve puna<br>bacharā na piye stana aisī sunāi

**Ābhog**

> chaila gara ḍori lagābe brajanārī<br>jala bharana bhula gai ṭhāḍi sakhiri roi

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Jhāpatāl is a 10-beat cycle divided as **2 + 3 + 2 + 3** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **2**, **O**, **3**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the ten columns correspond to beats 1–10, with sam **X** at beat 1, tali **2** at beat 3, khālī **O** at beat 6, and tali **3** at beat 8. 

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .jhapatal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   | **O** |   | **3** |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | - | S | R | R | m | P | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **mu** | **ra** | **lī** | **dhu** | **ni** | **su** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | n | D | P | $\lb{\mathrm{m}\mathrm{g}}$ | - | R | - | S |
| **ni** | **-** | **-** | **a** | **lī** | **ma** | **-** | **i** | **-** | **ya** |
| R | R | $\lb{\mathrm{R}\mathrm{g}}$ | m | g | R | S | R | $\mn{\mathrm{n}}$ | S |
| **mu** | **nā** | **tī** | **-** | **ra** | **ta** | **ba** | **so** | **ha** | **ma** |
| S | R | m | m | m | P | P | m | n | P |
| **ta** | **na** | **ma** | **na** | **jo** | **ba** | **na** | **so** | **-** | **bi** |
| $\lb{\mathrm{m}\mathrm{g}}$ | - | R | - | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **kā** | **-** | **i** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .jhapatal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   | **O** |   | **3** |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| m | m | m | P | D | n | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **pa** | **va** | **na** | **ga** | **ti** | **hī** | **-** | **na** | **bha** | **i** |
| $\lb{\sps{\tr{\mathrm{S}}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{g}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | n | D |
| **ya** | **mu** | **nā** | **-** | **u** | **jā** | **-** | **na** | **ba** | **he** |
| m | m | m | P | D | n | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **pa** | **va** | **na** | **ga** | **ti** | **hī** | **-** | **na** | **bha** | **i** |
| $\lb{\sps{\tr{\mathrm{S}}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{g}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | n | D |
| **ya** | **mu** | **nā** | **-** | **u** | **jā** | **-** | **na** | **ba** | **he** |
| P | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | n | D | m |
| **bi** | **sa** | **ra** | **ga** | **i** | **ga** | **va** | **na** | **śu** | **ka** |
| P | D | $\lb{\sps{\tr{\mathrm{S}}}\mathrm{n}}$ | D | P | m | P | m | n | P |
| **sā** | **-** | **ri** | **-** | **ha** | **mā** | **-** | **rī** | **-** | **-** |
| $\lb{\mathrm{m}\mathrm{g}}$ | - | R | - | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **pyā** | **-** | **rī** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Sañcārī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .jhapatal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   | **O** |   | **3** |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| P | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | n | D | P |
| **tha** | **gi** | **ta** | **bha** | **i** | **mī** | **-** | **na** | **ga** | **u** |
| m | - | g | R | R | $\lb{\mathrm{R}\mathrm{g}}$ | m | g | R | S |
| **tri** | **-** | **ṇa** | **na** | **ca** | **vā** | **-** | **ve** | **pu** | **na** |
| P | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | n | D | P |
| **tha** | **gi** | **ta** | **bha** | **i** | **mī** | **-** | **na** | **ga** | **u** |
| m | - | g | R | R | $\lb{\mathrm{R}\mathrm{g}}$ | m | g | R | S |
| **tri** | **-** | **ṇa** | **na** | **ca** | **bā** | **-** | **ve** | **pu** | **na** |
| S | R | m | - | m | m | - | m | P | D |
| **ba** | **cha** | **rā** | **-** | **na** | **pi** | **-** | **ye** | **sta** | **na** |
| n | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | n | D | - | P | - | - |
| **aisi** | **-** | **su** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Ābhog {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .jhapatal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   | **O** |   | **3** |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| m | - | m | P | D | n | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **chai** | **-** | **la** | **ga** | **ra** | **ḍo** | **-** | **ri** | **-** | **la** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{g}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | n | D |
| **gā** | **-** | **ve** | **braja** | **nā** | **-** | **rī** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| n | D | m | P | D | N | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **chai** | **-** | **la** | **ga** | **ra** | **ḍo** | **-** | **ri** | **-** | **la** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{g}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | n | D |
| **gā** | **-** | **be** | **bra** | **ja** | **nā** | **-** | **rī** | **-** | **-** |
| P | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | n | D | m |
| **ja** | **la** | **bha** | **ra** | **na** | **bhu** | **-** | **la** | **ga** | **i** |
| P | D | $\lb{\sps{\tr{\mathrm{S}}}\mathrm{n}}$ | D | P | m | P | m | n | P |
| **ṭhā** | **-** | **ḍi ** | **-** | **sa** | **khi** | **-** | **ri** | **-** | **-** |
| $\lb{\mathrm{m}\mathrm{g}}$ | - | R | - | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **ro** | **-** | **i** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::
